name: python3-magic
title: python3-magic
summary: python3 interface to the libmagic file type identification library
description:
python3 interface to the libmagic file type identification library
python-magic is a Python interface to the libmagic file type
identification library. libmagic identifies file types by checking
their headers according to a predefined list of file types. This
functionality is exposed to the command line by the Unix command file.
.
This package provides the Python 3 version of the python-magic module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-magic because python3 interface to the libmagic file type identification library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-magic as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-magic with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-magic --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
